summary: StrongDM's public NLSpec of Attractor — the non-interactive coding agent at the heart of the Software Factory; spec-only repo, implementation is whatever a coding agent produces from it.
StrongDM's open-source AI Context Store — content-addressed Turn DAG plus Blob CAS for immutable agent conversation/tool-output traces; the storage layer of the Dark Factory pattern.
OpenHands (formerly OpenDevin) — open coding-agent platform with SDK/CLI/GUI; the most mature OSS replacement for the proprietary inner loop in a Dark Factory build.
Cline — model-agnostic, review-first VS Code coding agent; reference implementation of the inner agentic loop that Dark Factory builds typically downgrade by removing the human-confirmation step.
Aider — terminal-native git-aware coding agent with strong SWE-bench scores; the kind of CLI agent parallel orchestrators spawn N copies of in worktrees.

SWE-agent — Princeton/CMU research-grade coding agent with a constrained Agent-Computer Interface; baseline target for most coding-agent eval pipelines. Active maintenance through 2026; pre-floor origin (2024) but still relevant.
Roo Code — Cline fork with custom 'modes' that constrain agent capabilities per phase; closest open analog to the multi-phase nodes in StrongDM's Attractor graph.
Repomix — packs an entire repo into AI-friendly bundles with tree-sitter compression and an MCP server; the context-packing utility coding agents use to fit codebases into context.
smolagents — Hugging Face's barebones code-as-action agent library; lightweight inner-agent option for narrow Dark Factory scenarios.
browser-use — LLM browser automation framework; closest OSS analog to a piece of StrongDM's Digital Twin Universe for third-party-service interaction.
LangWatch Scenario — agent-as-judge simulation framework with simulated users and verdict-emitting Judge Agents; the canonical OSS scenario-runner for satisfaction-style validation.
Inspect — UK AISI's open eval framework with 200+ pre-built capability/safety evals; the layer that decides whether a model+harness is safe to let off-leash.
Promptfoo — declarative LLM/agent eval and red-teaming CLI used by OpenAI/Anthropic; acquired by OpenAI Mar 9 2026, OSS repo continues.
Langfuse — OSS LLM observability + evals + prompt management; eval/observability substrate complementing CXDB for post-hoc agent-fleet debugging.
Composio Agent Orchestrator — spawns parallel coding agents in git worktrees, autonomously fixes CI/PR comments; standard parallel-agent orchestrator pattern.
Emdash (YC W26) — desktop multi-agent orchestrator running 24+ CLI agents in worktrees; supervised-mode counterpart to agent-orchestrator.
vibe-tools (formerly cursor-tools) — CLI tool-belt coding agents call for web search, repo Q&A, browser control; OSS shortcut for agent capabilities without writing each tool from scratch.
Anthropic Claude Code — official agentic CLI with plugins/agents/hooks/MCP; the most-cited closed-implementation coding-agent harness powering Dark Factory builds in 2026.
Claude Agent SDK (Python) — exposes the Claude Code agent loop as a library with custom tools/hooks and in-process MCP servers; glue between orchestration layer and inner agent.
Skyvern — vision-model-heavy browser automation for end-to-end task automation across third-party services; alternative to behavioral-clone DTUs for low-volume long-tail.
Stagehand — Browserbase's SDK pairing Playwright with natural-language act/extract/observe primitives; deterministic third-party-service interaction layer.
DeepEval — pytest-styled LLM eval framework with G-Eval, hallucination, faithfulness, agentic-toolcalling metrics; CI-friendly satisfaction-metric wrapper.
StrongDM vendor product page for Attractor — marketing-grade definition of the Dark Factory's coding-agent component; companion to the GitHub spec repo.
StrongDM vendor product page for CXDB — marketing-grade definition of the AI Context Store layer; companion to the GitHub repo.
